name: ZZ
comments: We have participated in the program for just 2 months so far. Already we are seeing an average of 10 customers per day bringing in the coupon! At a $40 average ticket, this is $400 revenue EACH DAY! This puts us on pace for a $100,000+ profit from Fred Meyer alone. Thank you to our rep, Meghan Wink, for choosing us and for providing us great customer service!
